summary: Modularize the CLI and add schema migrations plus a stable agent adapter protocol
description: Modularize the CLI and add schema migrations plus a stable agent adapter protocol
acceptance: Core version, migration, and adapter protocol logic lives in importable focused modules while cli/go.py remains compatible
go migrate supports dry-run and explicit apply for versioned .go contracts
Hermes, Codex, and custom adapters consume and emit one documented versioned JSON protocol

evidence.summary: TDD cycles: migrate command absent -> transactional dry-run/apply/idempotence and rollback green; custom adapter lacked protocol env -> versioned request/result green; invalid result validator absent -> fail-closed validator green; modular/schema artifacts absent -> importable package and JSON schemas green. Regression: 55 tests, make check, editable-package import, release-check v0.3.0, and template local WSL check all passed. Critic: version compatibility restored through go version --json plus legacy fallback; no hosted automation references remain.
